stimulus:
Welcome! This experiment will take around 10 minutes.

To avoid technical issues, please keep the experiment tab (on Chrome or Firefox) active and in fullscreen mode for the whole duration of each task.

Press enter to begin.

Place your index finger on the comma key (,) and your middle finger on the period key (.)

During this task, on each trial you will see a letter.

Your task is to match the current letter to the letter that appeared either 1 or 2 trials ago, depending on the delay given to you for that block.

Press your index finger if the letters mismatch, and your middle finger if they match.

Your delay (the number of trials ago to which you compare the current letter) will change from block to block. You will be given the delay at the start of every block of trials.

Capitalization does not matter, so "T" matches with "t".

Your delay for this practice round is 1.

For blocks with a delay of 1, please respond mismatch for the first trial.

We'll start with a practice round. During practice, you will receive feedback and a reminder of the rules. These will be taken out for the test, so make sure you understand the instructions before moving on.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as possible.
Press enter to begin practice.

Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

Your accuracy is low. Remember:

  • Match the current letter to the letter that appeared some number of trials ago
  • Mismatch: comma key (,)
  • Match: period key (.)

You have been responding too slowly.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as possible.

You have not been responding to some trials. Please respond on every trial that requires a response.

We are now going to repeat the practice round.

Press enter to begin.

Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

Your accuracy is low. Remember:

  • Match the current letter to the letter that appeared some number of trials ago
  • Mismatch: comma key (,)
  • Match: period key (.)

You have not been responding to some trials. Please respond on every trial that requires a response.

We are now going to repeat the practice round.

Press enter to begin.

We will now start practice for a delay of 2.

For blocks with a delay of 2, please respond mismatch for the first two trials.

Keep your index finger on the comma key (,) and your middle finger on the period key (.)

Please match the current letter to the letter that appeared 2 trials ago.

Capitalization does not matter, so "T" matches with "t".

Press enter to continue.
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!

Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

Your accuracy is low. Remember:

  • Match the current letter to the letter that appeared some number of trials ago
  • Mismatch: comma key (,)
  • Match: period key (.)

You have not been responding to some trials. Please respond on every trial that requires a response.

We are now going to repeat the practice round.

Press enter to begin.
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!

Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

Your accuracy is low. Remember:

  • Match the current letter to the letter that appeared some number of trials ago
  • Mismatch: comma key (,)
  • Match: period key (.)

You have been responding too slowly.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as possible.

You have not been responding to some trials. Please respond on every trial that requires a response.

We are now going to repeat the practice round.

Press enter to begin.
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!
Respond Faster!

We will now start the test portion.

Keep your index finger on the comma key (,) and your middle finger on the period key (.)

Your delay for this block is 2. Please match the current letter to the letter that appeared 2 trials ago.

Capitalization does not matter, so "T" matches with "t".

Press enter to continue.

Press the key for the second to last letter of the English alphabet.

This screen will advance automatically in 15 seconds. Do not press shift.
